wnba.summary: The Fever revoked the credentials of reporter Scott Agness, who said the team told him the decision was made because of "the spread of inaccurate and unsubstantiated information."

wnba.headline: Fever clear air in 'much-needed' team meeting, Cunningham says
wnba.summary: Fever guard Sophie Cunningham said players and coaches had a frank, "long" conversation intended to hash things out and get everyone back on the same page following back-to-back losses on the West Coast.

wnba.headline: A’ja Wilson's 25 points, 15 rebounds and 5 blocks lead the Aces past the Sparks 79-69
wnba.summary: — A’ja Wilson had 25 points, 15 rebounds and five blocks, Jackie Young added 16 points and nine assists, and the Las Vegas Aces beat the Los Angeles Sparks 79-69 on Tuesday night.

ncaab.headline: 2026 NCAA baseball tournament: Super regionals schedule, channels
ncaab.summary: How to watch this year's NCAA baseball tournament with schedule, scores and channels.

ncaab.headline: Bub Terrell expresses his love for Auburn after Super Regional bid
ncaab.summary: Terrell discusses how much he loves the Tigers and the fans as he thanks Auburn for the incredible atmosphere after taking down Milwaukee, 8-3.

ncaab.headline: Highlight: Oklahoma soars to NCAA Super Regionals via Dayton Tockey's walk-off homer
ncaab.summary: Jaxon Willits' game-tying RBI single forces extras then Tockey goes yard in the 10th to claim the 8-7 regional final win vs. 2-seed Georgia Tech and advance OU in the NCAA tourney.

ncaab.headline: Highlight: Kentucky concludes season with loss to West Virginia in regional final
ncaab.summary: Hudson Brown cranks a three-run homer before Ethan Hindle belts a solo homer in the Wildcats' four-run eighth inning to tie the game, but fall in extras to the Mountaineers, 6-5.

ncaab.headline: Highlight: Auburn advances to Super Regionals with five-run inning to rout Milwaukee
ncaab.summary: Chase Fralick homers while six batters record RBIs for the 5-seed Tigers as they use a five-run sixth inning to take down the Panthers, 8-3.

ncaab.headline: Highlight: 8-seed Florida falls to Troy in regional final
ncaab.summary: Kyle Jones brings in both RBI for the Gators as they drop to the Trojans, 10-2, and conclude their season (41-21) coming up short in the Gainesville Regional final.

tennis.headline: Italians Cobolli, Arnaldi advance to French Open semifinals
tennis.summary: Tenth-seeded Flavio Cobolli beat No. 4 Felix Auger-Aliassime in the men's quarterfinals of the French Open on Wednesday and will face fellow Italian Matteo Arnaldi for a spot in the final.

tennis.headline: French Open 2026: How to watch in the UK, schedule, prize money, Brit watch
tennis.summary: Find out all you need to know about the 2026 French Open in the UK, with dates, TV information, prize money and more.

tennis.headline: Mensik halts Fonseca, gets Zverev next in French Open semifinals
tennis.summary: Jakub Mensik rolled to a straight-sets win over Brazilian teen Joao Fonseca to advance to the French Open semifinals, where he'll face No. 2 seed Alexander Zverev.

tennis.headline: After his French Open loss, what's next for Frances Tiafoe?
tennis.summary: Frances Tiafoe was the last American standing at the French Open -- exceeding all expectations. And it bodes well for the rest of his season.

tennis.headline: Former US Open finalist Kei Nishikori to retire after Japan Open
tennis.summary: Kei Nishikori, a finalist at the 2014 US Open, will conclude his 20-year professional career later this year after he competes in the Japan Open.

tennis.headline: Matteo Arnaldi outlasts Frances Tiafoe in 5 sets at French Open
tennis.summary: Matteo Arnaldi made it three Italians in the French Open quarterfinals when he beat Frances Tiafoe -- the last American man in the draw -- 7-6 (5), 6-7 (5), 3-6, 7-6 (3), 6-4 in a match that lasted 5 hours, 26 minutes and ended after 1 a.m. Tuesday.

f1.headline: Charles Leclerc renews Ferrari deal ahead of Monaco Grand Prix
f1.summary: Charles Leclerc has renewed his contract with Ferrari, keeping him at the team for "the coming seasons," according to an announcement from the team.

f1.headline: Ferrari's best chance for a 2026 win? Why Lewis Hamilton, Charles Leclerc are eyeing Monaco GP glory
f1.summary: Could this weekend's Monaco Grand Prix be Ferrari's chance to get its first win on the board since Mexico in 2024? ESPN's Laurence Edmondson explains the hype.

f1.headline: What is F1's 'ADUO'? The new engine rule that could shake up 2026 and Mercedes, Ferrari title race
f1.summary: Formula 1 has always been a sport of buzzwords and phrases that sound completely made up -- this year is no different, and the acronym ADUO is a buzzword fans will hear plenty of in the lead-up to and in the weeks after the Monaco Grand Prix.

f1.headline: Monaco Grand Prix 2026: Race start time, how to watch, full schedule, predictions
f1.summary: Formula 1 returns to the streets of Monaco for the sixth race of the season and marks the start of the European races.

f1.headline: Lewis Hamilton not at level required to win eighth world championship - Rosberg
f1.summary: Lewis Hamilton is currently not at the level required with Ferrari to win a record eighth world championship, Nico Rosberg has claimed -- despite hailing his former rival's "incredible" longevity in Formula One.

f1.headline: McLaren reveal special livery for Monaco GP ahead of 1000th race
f1.summary: McLaren has revealed a special livery it will race with at the Monaco Grand Prix to mark its 1000th Formula 1 race.

football.headline: Roger Goodell won't testify about NFL's broadcasting deals
football.summary: Roger Goodell will not testify before Congress next week about the NFL's broadcast deals and its recent practice of airing games on paywalled streaming services.

football.headline: Maxx Crosby (knee) closing in on practice return for Raiders
football.summary: Maxx Crosby said he's really close to participating in practice for the Raiders, acknowledging that his rehab from offseason knee surgery has been long but rewarding.

football.headline: Kamara unfazed by uncertain Saints status: 'It's a business'
football.summary: Saints running back Alvin Kamara said Wednesday he had no issues with the team despite a lack of clarity about his future.

football.headline: Odell Beckham Jr. knows roster spot with Giants isn't a given
football.summary: Odell Beckham Jr. knows that a roster spot isn't guaranteed this time around with the Giants. "I like it this way," he said. "I feel like it's going to elevate me."

football.headline: Jason McCourty: Micah Parsons' injury absence massive for Packers
football.summary: Jason McCourty: Micah Parsons' injury absence massive for Packers

football.headline: Browns' Jared Verse: I'm not here to fill Myles Garrett's shoes
football.summary: New Browns edge rusher Jared Verse said he's not seeking to replace Myles Garrett after Monday's blockbuster trade.
